name: Layered Dinner
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Can cut green beans, drained
10 1/2 oz Cream of celery soup, condensed can
recipeInstructions:
1. Place green beans in a 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole.
2. Top with slices of meat.
3. In a small bowl, combine soup, mayonnaise and mustard. Blend together well.
4. Pour soup mixture over meat slices.
5. Top with cheese.
6. In a small, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, melt 1 tablespoon of butter in Microwave Oven for 15 seconds.
7. Toss croutons in melted butter.
8. Sprinkle buttered croutons over cheese.
9. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 10 minutes. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
